evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2200);try{MOS.setCfgTab('personal')}catch(e){}await w(4000);const c=document.getElementById('personalContenedor');const lm=document.getElementById('listMeCajeros');const out={persLen:c?c.innerHTML.length:-1,admins:c?/Administradores/.test(c.textContent||''):false,vend:c?/Vendedores/.test(c.textContent||''):false,oper:c?/Operadores/.test(c.textContent||''):false,meCajerosOk:!!lm,persCards:c?c.querySelectorAll('.pers-card-wrap').length:-1};c&&c.scrollIntoView({block:'start'});window.scrollTo(0,0);out.ov=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1;await w(400);return out;})()
